pauses.placement: before segment starts and after kill/payoff lines; almost never mid-exposition

delivery: fast, even, conversational-dry; energy from pace and wording, never from pitch spikes; no exclamation
instruct: Energetic but even storyteller pace, conversational and dry, a hint of amusement under a straight face. Reads fast without rushing, tiny beat before a name or a number, lets one short pause land after each story's payoff line. No dramatics, no announcer voice.
outro: settle in the last two scenes: slightly slower, lower, conclusive falling cadence (our wind-down rule; their videos end abruptly, ours improves this)

aaaflow_mapping.voice_speed_note: our narrator baseline reads ~185 wpm at 1.0 on dense text; 1.06 approaches their 197-205 band without sounding rushed; validate against one-take QA duration and adjust once
